title: Requirements, ER Modeling, Functional Dependencies, and Normalization · Query Trace: Requirements Entities
summary: A growing incident system repeats team and member facts, mixes multiple values per cell, and produces update anomalies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql requirements entities increment in a normalized incident-system schema defense. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive entities, attributes, identifiers, relationships, optionality, and business rules from stakeholder language.
Capture affected identity, before/after evidence, actor, reason, and changed count for mutations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
